title: K-200 Comms/Datalink Environmental Test Report
text:
# K-200 Comms/Datalink Environmental Test Report

Document number: MD-DOC-463-G. Revision: G. Type: risk-register. Author: Tobias Wren. Created: 2023-09-28. Last modified: 2023-12-05. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Comms/Datalink subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1035, P-1150.
